_meta.dna: macos(native) = apple_silicon(optimized) x notarization(signed) x keychain(integrated) x universal_binary(arm+x86) x accessibility(voiceover) x design(human_interface) x sandboxed(secure)
_meta.question_expansion_instruction: Each floor lists 7 seed questions. During execution, expand to ~100 questions per persona. macOS users expect native quality — smooth animations, Retina graphics, and system integration. Every question must probe whether Solace Browser feels like a first-class Mac citizen.

name: Tower of macOS
protocol: FORECAST -> CROSS-REF -> AUDIT -> FIX -> VERIFY -> SEAL -> POSTMORTEM

questions: Is the macOS build a universal binary (arm64 + x86_64) that runs natively on Apple Silicon?
Does the app use hardware acceleration on Apple Silicon (Metal, VideoToolbox)?
Is the binary notarized and signed with a valid Apple Developer certificate?
Does the app pass Gatekeeper checks without requiring 'Allow from anywhere'?
Are native node modules compiled for both architectures in the universal binary?
Does the app launch in under 3 seconds on Apple Silicon?
Is Rosetta 2 translation avoided (true native ARM64 execution)?
Does the app follow Apple Human Interface Guidelines for window management?
Is there a proper macOS menu bar with standard menus (File, Edit, View, Window, Help)?
Do standard keyboard shortcuts work (Cmd+Q quit, Cmd+W close, Cmd+, preferences)?
Does the app support the macOS native dark/light mode via prefers-color-scheme?
Are window resize, minimize, and full-screen behaviors standard?
Does the traffic light (close/minimize/maximize) work correctly?
Does the app support macOS Spaces and Mission Control?
Are all images and icons sharp on Retina displays (2x and 3x assets)?
Do CSS pixel calculations account for devicePixelRatio on Retina?
Are SVG icons used instead of raster images for scalability?
Does the canvas (if any) render at the correct resolution on Retina?
Do screenshots captured by the evidence system use Retina resolution?
Are font rendering and anti-aliasing correct on Retina displays?
Does the app handle display scaling changes (plug/unplug external monitor)?
Does the OAuth3 vault integrate with macOS Keychain for secure token storage?
Are Keychain access controls set to 'this application only'?
Does the vault fallback to encrypted file storage if Keychain is unavailable?
Can users see Solace Browser entries in Keychain Access.app?
Are Keychain entries cleaned up on app uninstall?
Does Touch ID / Face ID unlock the vault on supported Macs?
Is the Keychain integration using the modern Security framework (not deprecated APIs)?
Is the app sandboxed with appropriate entitlements?
Are file system access requests scoped to user-selected directories?
Does the app use NSOpenPanel for file access (not direct path access)?
Are network entitlements appropriately restricted?
Does the sandbox allow the browser automation engine to function?
Are temporary files written to the app's sandbox container?
Does the app handle sandbox denial gracefully (not crash)?
Can a VoiceOver user navigate all browser UI elements?
Are ARIA labels correctly mapped to VoiceOver announcements?
Does the YinYang approval dialog work with VoiceOver?
Can VoiceOver users access the settings page and change themes?
Are keyboard navigation and VoiceOver focus synchronized?
Do VoiceOver rotor actions work for headings, links, and form fields?
Are dynamic content changes announced to VoiceOver (aria-live)?
Is the app signed with a valid Developer ID Application certificate?
Is the app notarized with Apple's notarization service?
Does the DMG/ZIP distribution include the notarization ticket (stapled)?
Does the app pass `spctl --assess` verification?
Are all embedded frameworks and dylibs also signed?
Is hardened runtime enabled with appropriate exceptions?
Does the entitlements file request only necessary capabilities?
Does the app icon in the Dock match Apple design guidelines (rounded square, no border)?
Does the Dock icon show a badge count for pending approvals?
Can the app be started from Dock and from Spotlight?
Does Cmd+Tab switching work correctly (proper app name and icon)?
Are notifications delivered through macOS Notification Center?
Can users manage notification preferences in System Preferences?
Does the app support Dock bounce for attention-requiring events?
Does the auto-updater work on macOS (Sparkle or Electron autoUpdater)?
Are updates signed with the same Developer ID certificate?
Does the update process preserve user data and preferences?
Can users check for updates manually (Help → Check for Updates)?
Does the updater support delta updates (not full download)?
Is the update download verified with a checksum before installation?
Does the app restart cleanly after an update?
Can users drag files from Finder into Solace Browser?
Does drag-and-drop work for importing recipes, themes, and apps?
Can users drag text and URLs from Solace Browser to other apps?
Is the drag preview (ghost image) appropriate for the dragged content?
Does drop target highlighting follow macOS conventions?
Can users drag between Solace Browser windows?
Are drop operations undoable (Cmd+Z)?
Does copy/paste work correctly between Solace Browser and other apps?
Does Universal Clipboard (copy on iPhone, paste on Mac) work?
Are rich formats (HTML, images) preserved in clipboard operations?
Can users paste screenshots directly into file upload fields?
Does Cmd+Shift+V (paste as plain text) work?
Are clipboard operations evidence-captured for audit?
Does the clipboard handle sensitive data (passwords, tokens) securely?
Does pinch-to-zoom work for zooming page content?
Do two-finger swipe gestures work for back/forward navigation?
Does three-finger drag work for moving windows?
Is momentum scrolling smooth and natural?
Does force touch (if available) provide useful functionality?
Are gesture interactions accessible to users who can't perform multi-touch?
Does the app handle gesture conflicts with system gestures gracefully?
Does the app provide Touch Bar controls on supported MacBooks?
Are common actions (approve, reject, navigate) available in the Touch Bar?
Does the Touch Bar update contextually based on the current page?
Is the Touch Bar layout accessible and logical?
Does the app handle Touch Bar absence gracefully (newer MacBooks)?
Are Touch Bar buttons large enough to press accurately?
Does the app clean up Touch Bar registrations on quit?
Does Handoff allow continuing browser sessions from iPhone to Mac?
Can users start an approval on iPhone and complete on Mac?
Does AirDrop work for sharing recipes and themes?
Is iCloud integration available for settings sync?
Does Siri integration provide useful shortcuts?
Can Spotlight index Solace Browser content?
Does the app support Share Sheet for sharing content?
Does the app use App Nap when in the background?
Is the app energy-efficient per Activity Monitor's Energy tab?
Does the app avoid preventing system sleep unnecessarily?
Are background tasks (daemon scheduler) energy-efficient?
Does the app reduce activity when on battery power?
Is the app's CPU usage near zero when idle?
Does the app handle thermal throttling gracefully?
Does the app request permissions correctly (camera, microphone, screen recording)?
Are privacy permission requests explained with usage description strings?
Can users revoke permissions in System Preferences → Privacy?
Does the app function correctly with some permissions denied?
Is Full Disk Access requested only when necessary?
Are Accessibility permissions requested with clear justification?
Does the app handle permission changes without requiring restart?
Does the app handle multiple displays correctly?
Can windows be moved between displays with different resolutions?
Does the app remember window position per display configuration?
Does the app handle display connect/disconnect without crashing?
Are dialogs (YinYang approval) positioned on the correct display?
Does the app handle mixed-resolution displays (Retina + non-Retina)?
Does the app support Sidecar (iPad as second display)?
Can the app be configured to launch at login?
Is the login item registered using the modern SMLoginItemSetEnabled API?
Does the daemon mode install a proper LaunchAgent?
Is the LaunchAgent plist correctly formatted and signed?
Can users disable auto-launch from the app's settings?
Does the login item appear in System Preferences → Login Items?
Does the background agent use minimal resources?
Does the app submit crash reports to Apple's crash reporting system?
Are crash logs symbolicated for debugging?
Does the app offer to send crash reports with user consent?
Can users find crash logs in ~/Library/Logs/DiagnosticReports/?
Does the app recover gracefully after a crash (restore session)?
Are out-of-memory kills handled differently from crashes?
Does the app log enough context to diagnose crashes from reports?

floors.persona_domain: system integration with Quick Look, Spotlight, Services
questions: Does the app register file types for Quick Look preview?
Can Spotlight index app-specific documents (recipes, evidence)?
Does the app provide Services menu items?
Can users set Solace Browser as the default handler for specific protocols?
Does the app support macOS Share extensions?
Are app-specific file types registered with proper UTI declarations?
Does the app handle openFile: Apple Events correctly?
Does the app work correctly on the latest macOS version?
Are new system features (Stage Manager, etc.) supported?
Does the app handle macOS API deprecations gracefully?
Is the minimum supported macOS version clearly documented?
Does the app use modern AppKit/SwiftUI APIs where appropriate?
Are new privacy requirements (macOS 15+) handled?
Does the app support the latest macOS notification features?
Is the DMG download clearly linked from the download page?
Does the DMG open to a clean install window (app icon → Applications)?
Is the DMG background image professional and branded?
Does the install process work without admin privileges (user Applications)?
Is the DMG size reasonable (not bloated with debug symbols)?
Does the app detect if it's running from the DMG (not installed) and offer to move?
Is there an uninstaller or clear uninstall instructions?
Are app data files backed up by Time Machine?
Are large files (browser cache, temporary data) excluded from Time Machine?
Can users restore app state from a Time Machine backup?
Does the app handle restoring from backup gracefully (no stale locks)?
Are the vault and evidence chain backed up securely?
Does the app use correct filesystem locations (~/Library/Application Support)?
Are temporary files stored in the correct directory (not polluting backups)?
Does the app handle network transitions (Wi-Fi → Ethernet → VPN) gracefully?
Is the app compatible with macOS firewall settings?
Does the app work through corporate proxies?
Can the app detect captive portals (hotel/airport Wi-Fi)?
Does the tunnel connection (cloudflared) work on macOS?
Is TLS certificate pinning implemented for sensitive connections?
Does the app handle DNS resolution correctly on macOS?
Does the app expose UI elements through the Accessibility API?
Can automation tools (Automator, AppleScript) interact with the app?
Does Zoom (display zoom) work correctly with the app?
Can Switch Control users navigate the app?
Does Voice Control work for dictation and commands?
Are all controls labeled in the Accessibility Inspector?
Does the app support Dynamic Type (system font size changes)?
Does the app use Secure Enclave for cryptographic operations where available?
Is the app compatible with FileVault (full disk encryption)?
Does the app clear sensitive data from memory after use?
Are IPC mechanisms (XPC, Mach ports) used securely?
Does the app prevent library injection attacks?
Is the app compiled with stack canaries and ASLR?
Does hardened runtime prevent unauthorized code execution?
Does the app pick up the macOS system language correctly?
Are date/time formats using macOS locale settings?
Does the app handle right-to-left system languages on macOS?
Are decimal separators and number formats locale-aware?
Does the app handle macOS input methods (Japanese, Chinese, Korean)?
Are system dialogs (file picker, print) localized?
Does spell-checking work in the correct language?
Does the app use the native macOS print dialog?
Can users print evidence reports and audit trails?
Does print preview render correctly?
Are print margins and page layout appropriate?
Does the app support PDF export via the print dialog?
Can users choose paper size and orientation?
Does printing work with AirPrint printers?

floors.persona_domain: CLI and terminal integration on macOS
questions: Can solace-cli be invoked from Terminal.app and iTerm2?
Is there a `solace` command available after installation?
Does the CLI handle macOS file paths correctly (spaces, accents)?
Can the CLI launch Solace Browser GUI from the terminal?
Are man pages installed for the CLI commands?
Does tab completion work in zsh (macOS default shell)?
Can the CLI open browser sessions in background (headless) on macOS?
Is there a Homebrew cask for installing Solace Browser?
Does `brew install --cask solace-browser` work correctly?
Is the cask formula maintained and up to date?
Does the Homebrew install handle dependencies correctly?
Can users upgrade via `brew upgrade solace-browser`?
Is the SHA256 checksum verified during installation?
Does the Homebrew installation path match the DMG installation?
What does Activity Monitor show for CPU and memory usage?
Does the app appear in the Energy tab with low energy impact?
Are there excessive disk reads/writes visible in Activity Monitor?
Does Instruments (Xcode) show any performance issues?
Is the app's GPU usage efficient?
Does the app handle memory pressure (yellow/red in Activity Monitor)?
Are there any runaway timers or background processes?

floors.persona_domain: forward compatibility with upcoming macOS versions
questions: Does the app work on macOS beta versions?
Are deprecated APIs flagged and replaced proactively?
Does the app handle new privacy requirements in future macOS?
Is there a compatibility testing matrix for macOS versions?
Are framework changes (WebKit, Electron) tracked for compatibility?
Does the app handle new hardware features (Neural Engine, etc.)?
Is there a plan for supporting Apple Vision Pro (visionOS)?
Does the app handle APFS features (snapshots, clones) correctly?
Are file paths case-insensitive safe (APFS default)?
Does the app handle extended attributes (xattr) correctly?
Are quarantine flags handled for downloaded files?
Does the app work on encrypted APFS volumes?
Are symbolic links handled correctly in data directories?
Does the app handle file names with Unicode normalization differences?
Can the app store data in iCloud Drive for cross-device sync?
Does the app handle iCloud file conflicts gracefully?
Are iCloud-stored files available offline?
Does the app handle iCloud account changes?
Is iCloud sync optional (not required for the app to function)?

Does the app respect iCloud storage quotas?
Would migrating to Mac Catalyst improve the macOS experience?
Are there SwiftUI components that could replace web UI for native feel?
Could native macOS notifications replace web-based ones?
Would a native menu bar app provide better system integration?
Could Shortcuts.app integration automate common Solace workflows?
Would a native share extension reach more users?
Could Widgets (macOS Sonoma) provide at-a-glance status?
Does Migration Assistant transfer Solace Browser data to a new Mac?
Is the app data in the correct location for Migration Assistant?
Does the app handle running after Migration Assistant (new hardware)?
Are Keychain items migrated correctly?
Does the app detect and handle first-run-after-migration?
Are file permissions correct after migration?
Can users manually export/import settings between Macs?
Can the app be deployed via MDM (Jamf, Intune, Mosyle)?
Is there a .pkg installer for mass deployment?
Can IT admins pre-configure settings via managed preferences?
Does the app support managed App Store distribution?
Can IT admins restrict features via configuration profiles?
Is the app compatible with corporate VPN and proxy?
Does the app work in a managed Apple ID environment?
How does Solace Browser compare to Chromium on macOS Speedometer?
What is the cold start time on M1 vs M2 vs Intel Macs?
Does the app maintain 60fps animations on all supported Macs?
What is the memory footprint on a base 8GB MacBook Air?
How does battery life compare when using Solace vs Chromium for browsing?
What is the file I/O performance for evidence chain operations?
Does the app handle 20+ tabs without significant memory growth?
Does the app leave residual files after uninstallation?
Are Keychain entries cleaned up on uninstall?
Are LaunchAgents removed on uninstall?
Does the app remove its Application Support directory?
Are login items deregistered on uninstall?
Does the app remove its Preferences plist?
Can third-party uninstallers (AppCleaner) find all app files?
Can power users create Automator workflows with Solace Browser?
Does AppleScript support allow scripting browser actions?
Can Solace Browser be controlled via osascript from Terminal?
Does the app integrate with Alfred or Raycast launchers?
Can users create keyboard shortcuts via System Preferences?
Does the app support Split View for side-by-side work?
Can professional users set up Solace Browser in their dock-based workflow?
Does the app appear correctly in macOS screen recordings?
Can users take screenshots of the app with Cmd+Shift+3/4?
Does the app handle screen recording permissions correctly?
Are sensitive areas (vault, tokens) excluded from screen capture?
Does the app work with screen recording tools (OBS, QuickTime)?
Are overlays and popups captured in screenshots?
Does the app support the macOS markup tools for screenshots?

floors.persona_domain: macOS Focus and Do Not Disturb
questions: Does the app respect macOS Focus/Do Not Disturb settings?
Can users configure Solace Browser's notification behavior per Focus mode?
Does the app support Focus filters?
Are time-sensitive notifications (approval requests) delivered during Focus?
Does the daemon scheduler respect Focus settings?
Can users set up a 'Work' Focus that allows Solace Browser notifications?
Does the app suppress non-critical notifications during scheduled Focus?
Can users scan documents via Continuity Camera into Solace Browser?
Does the app support inserting photos from iPhone?
Can users use iPhone as a webcam for video evidence?
Does Continuity Markup work for annotating screenshots?
Can users sketch on iPad and insert into Solace Browser?
Does the app handle Continuity connection failures gracefully?
Are Continuity features discovered and used when available?
Does the web content render correctly if using WKWebView (macOS native)?
Are CSS features used compatible with the latest WebKit?
Does the app handle WebKit-specific quirks or vendor prefixes?
Are JavaScript APIs used supported by the macOS WebKit version?
Does the app handle WebKit security policies correctly?
Are there WebKit-specific performance optimizations?
Does the app test against multiple WebKit versions?

floors.persona_domain: macOS privacy reporting and Intelligent Tracking Prevention
questions: Does the app comply with macOS privacy reporting?
Are tracking protections compatible with the app's functionality?
Does the app handle Intelligent Tracking Prevention correctly?
Are privacy nutrition labels accurate for the app?
Does the app's network activity match its privacy claims?
Can users view what data the app accesses in Privacy Report?
Does the app handle privacy changes in macOS updates?

floors.persona_domain: running Solace Browser on macOS Server
questions: Can Solace Browser run in headless mode on macOS Server?
Does the daemon mode work correctly on macOS Server?
Can the cloud twin run on a Mac mini as a server?
Is there documentation for macOS Server deployment?
Does the app handle server-specific configurations (no display)?
Can multiple users run Solace Browser on a shared macOS Server?
Does the app handle process management on macOS Server?
Can developers debug the app using Xcode Instruments?
Are dsym files available for symbolication?
Does the app provide useful logs via Console.app?
Can developers use Charles Proxy to inspect app network traffic?
Is the app compatible with Xcode's memory debugger?
Can developers build the app from source on macOS?
Are there developer-focused docs for contributing on macOS?
Does Solace Browser feel like a native Mac app (not a web wrapper)?
Would a Mac power user choose Solace Browser as their daily driver?
Does the macOS build showcase the best of what the platform can offer?
Is the install-to-first-value time under 5 minutes on macOS?
Does the app make the Mac ecosystem stronger (not just live on it)?
Would Apple feature Solace Browser in the Mac App Store 'Top Picks'?
Is this the Mac app the Dragon Rider would use daily?
Can a non-technical Mac user install the app from a DMG without help?
Does the app look and feel familiar to a regular Mac user?
Can the user find and change settings without getting lost?
Does the app crash or behave oddly in normal use on a Mac?
Would the user know how to get help if something goes wrong?
Does the app integrate with the tools the user already knows (Finder, Spotlight)?
Would a non-technical Mac user recommend this app to a friend?
